# Skeleton-path baseline (both offset flags explicitly off): same
# geometry as offset-carriers-tilted-rect. Held as a reference to see
# which sides the weighted-skeleton path drops stalls from.

polygon outer
10,0
400,30
380,300
-10,280
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

debug offset_carriers=false
----
debug offset_carriers=false

debug offset_carriers_interior=false
----
debug offset_carriers_interior=false

generate
----
total_stalls: 274

snapshot
----
